001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.bean.swagger;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.marshall.internal.ConverterUtils.*;
023
024import java.util.*;
025
026import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
027import org.apache.juneau.commons.http.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.marshall.json.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.marshall.objecttools.*;
031
032/**
033 * This is the root document object for the Swagger 2.0 API specification.
034 *
035 * <p>
036 * The Swagger Object is the root document that describes an entire API. It contains metadata about the API,
037 * available paths and operations, parameters, responses, security definitions, and other information. This is
038 * the Swagger 2.0 specification (predecessor to OpenAPI 3.0).
039 *
040 * <h5 class='section'>Swagger Specification:</h5>
041 * <p>
042 * The Swagger Object is composed of the following fields:
043 * <ul class='spaced-list'>
044 *    <li><c>swagger</c> (string, REQUIRED) - The Swagger Specification version (must be <js>"2.0"</js>)
045 *    <li><c>info</c> ({@link Info}, REQUIRED) - Provides metadata about the API
046 *    <li><c>host</c> (string) - The host (name or IP) serving the API
047 *    <li><c>basePath</c> (string) - The base path on which the API is served (relative to host)
048 *    <li><c>schemes</c> (array of string) - The transfer protocols of the API (e.g., <js>"http"</js>, <js>"https"</js>)
049 *    <li><c>consumes</c> (array of string) - A list of MIME types the APIs can consume
050 *    <li><c>produces</c> (array of string) - A list of MIME types the APIs can produce
051 *    <li><c>paths</c> (map of {@link OperationMap}, REQUIRED) - The available paths and operations for the API
052 *    <li><c>definitions</c> (map of {@link SchemaInfo}) - Schema definitions that can be referenced
053 *    <li><c>parameters</c> (map of {@link ParameterInfo}) - Parameters definitions that can be referenced
054 *    <li><c>responses</c> (map of {@link ResponseInfo}) - Response definitions that can be referenced
055 *    <li><c>securityDefinitions</c> (map of {@link SecurityScheme}) - Security scheme definitions
056 *    <li><c>security</c> (array of map) - Security requirements applied to all operations
057 *    <li><c>tags</c> (array of {@link Tag}) - A list of tags used by the specification with additional metadata
058 *    <li><c>externalDocs</c> ({@link ExternalDocumentation}) - Additional external documentation
059 * </ul>
060 *
061 * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
062 * <p class='bjava'>
063 *    <jc>// Create a Swagger document</jc>
064 *    Swagger <jv>doc</jv> = <jk>new</jk> Swagger()
065 *       .setSwagger(<js>"2.0"</js>)
066 *       .setInfo(
067 *          <jk>new</jk> Info()
068 *             .setTitle(<js>"Pet Store API"</js>)
069 *             .setVersion(<js>"1.0.0"</js>)
070 *       )
071 *       .setHost(<js>"petstore.swagger.io"</js>)
072 *       .setBasePath(<js>"/v2"</js>)
073 *       .setSchemes(<js>"https"</js>)
074 *       .addPath(<js>"/pets"</js>, <js>"get"</js>,
075 *          <jk>new</jk> Operation()
076 *             .setSummary(<js>"List all pets"</js>)
077 *             .addResponse(<js>"200"</js>, <jk>new</jk> ResponseInfo(<js>"Success"</js>))
078 *       );
079 * </p>
080 *
081 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
082 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://swagger.io/specification/v2/">Swagger 2.0 Specification</a>
083 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://swagger.io/docs/specification/2-0/basic-structure/">Swagger Basic Structure</a>
084 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JuneauBeanSwagger2">juneau-bean-swagger-v2</a>
085 * </ul>
086 */
087@SuppressWarnings({
088   "java:S115" // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase convention
089})
090public class Swagger extends SwaggerElement {
091
092   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
093   private static final String ARG_c = "c";
094   private static final String ARG_in = "in";
095   private static final String ARG_method = "method";
096   private static final String ARG_methodName = "methodName";
097   private static final String ARG_name = "name";
098   private static final String ARG_operation = "operation";
099   private static final String ARG_parameter = "parameter";
100   private static final String ARG_path = "path";
101   private static final String ARG_property = "property";
102   private static final String ARG_ref = "ref";
103   private static final String ARG_response = "response";
104   private static final String ARG_scheme = "scheme";
105   private static final String ARG_schema = "schema";
106   private static final String ARG_securityScheme = "securityScheme";
107   private static final String ARG_status = "status";
108
109   private static interface MapOfStringLists extends Map<String,List<String>> {}
110
111   /** Represents a null swagger */
112   public static final Swagger NULL = new Swagger();
113
114   private static final Comparator<String> PATH_COMPARATOR = (o1, o2) -> o1.replace('{', '@').compareTo(o2.replace('{', '@'));
115
116   // Property name constants
117   private static final String PROP_basePath = "basePath";
118   private static final String PROP_consumes = "consumes";
119   private static final String PROP_definitions = "definitions";
120   private static final String PROP_externalDocs = "externalDocs";
121   private static final String PROP_host = "host";
122   private static final String PROP_info = "info";
123   private static final String PROP_parameters = "parameters";
124   private static final String PROP_paths = "paths";
125   private static final String PROP_produces = "produces";
126   private static final String PROP_responses = "responses";
127   private static final String PROP_schemes = "schemes";
128   private static final String PROP_security = "security";
129   private static final String PROP_securityDefinitions = "securityDefinitions";
130   private static final String PROP_swagger = "swagger";
131   private static final String PROP_tags = "tags";
132
133   private String swagger = "2.0";
134   private String host;
135   private String basePath;
136   private Info info;
137   private ExternalDocumentation externalDocs;
138   private Set<String> schemes = new LinkedHashSet<>();
139   private Set<MediaType> consumes = new LinkedHashSet<>();
140   private Set<MediaType> produces = new LinkedHashSet<>();
141   private Set<Tag> tags = new LinkedHashSet<>();
142   private List<Map<String,List<String>>> security = list();
143   private Map<String,JsonMap> definitions = map();
144   private Map<String,ParameterInfo> parameters = map();
145   private Map<String,ResponseInfo> responses = map();
146   private Map<String,SecurityScheme> securityDefinitions = map();
147
148   private Map<String,OperationMap> paths = new TreeMap<>(PATH_COMPARATOR);
149
150   /**
151    * Default constructor.
152    */
153   public Swagger() {}
154
155   /**
156    * Copy constructor.
157    *
158    * @param copyFrom The object to copy.
159    */
160   public Swagger(Swagger copyFrom) {
161      super(copyFrom);
162
163      this.basePath = copyFrom.basePath;
164      this.consumes.addAll(copyOf(copyFrom.consumes));
165      this.externalDocs = copyFrom.externalDocs == null ? null : copyFrom.externalDocs.copy();
166      this.host = copyFrom.host;
167      this.info = copyFrom.info == null ? null : copyFrom.info.copy();
168      this.produces.addAll(copyOf(copyFrom.produces));
169      this.schemes.addAll(copyOf(copyFrom.schemes));
170      this.swagger = copyFrom.swagger;
171
172      definitions.putAll(copyOf(copyFrom.definitions, JsonMap::new));
173
174      copyFrom.paths.forEach((k, v) -> {
175         var m = new OperationMap();
176         v.forEach((k2, v2) -> m.put(k2, v2.copy()));
177         paths.put(k, m);
178      });
179
180      parameters.putAll(copyOf(copyFrom.parameters, ParameterInfo::copy));
181      responses.putAll(copyOf(copyFrom.responses, ResponseInfo::copy));
182      securityDefinitions.putAll(copyOf(copyFrom.securityDefinitions, SecurityScheme::copy));
183
184      copyFrom.security.forEach(x -> {
185         Map<String,List<String>> m2 = map();
186         x.forEach((k, v) -> m2.put(k, copyOf(v)));
187         security.add(m2);
188      });
189
190      this.tags.addAll(copyOf(copyFrom.tags, Tag::copy));
191   }
192
193   /**
194    * Bean property appender:  <property>consumes</property>.
195    *
196    * <p>
197    * A list of MIME types the APIs can consume.
198    *
199    * @param values
200    *    The values to add to this property.
201    *    <br>Ignored if <jk>null</jk>.
202    * @return This object.
203    */
204   public Swagger addConsumes(Collection<MediaType> values) {
205      if (nn(values))
206         consumes.addAll(values);
207      return this;
208   }
209
210   /**
211    * Bean property appender:  <property>consumes</property>.
212    *
213    * <p>
214    * A list of MIME types the APIs can consume.
215    *
216    * @param values
217    *    The values to add to this property.
218    *    <br>Values MUST be as described under <a class="doclink" href="https://swagger.io/specification#mimeTypes">Swagger Mime Types</a>.
219    *    <br>Ignored if <jk>null</jk>.
220    * @return This object.
221    */
222   public Swagger addConsumes(MediaType...values) {
223      if (nn(values))
224         for (var v : values)
225            if (nn(v))
226               consumes.add(v);
227      return this;
228   }
229
230   /**
231    * Bean property appender:  <property>definitions</property>.
232    *
233    * <p>
234    * Adds a single value to the <property>definitions</property> property.
235    *
236    * @param name A definition name.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
237    * @param schema The schema that the name defines.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
238    * @return This object.
239    */
240   public Swagger addDefinition(String name, JsonMap schema) {
241      assertArgNotNull(ARG_name, name);
242      assertArgNotNull(ARG_schema, schema);
243      definitions.put(name, schema);
244      return this;
245   }
246
247   /**
248    * Bean property appender:  <property>parameters</property>.
249    *
250    * <p>
251    * Adds a single value to the <property>parameter</property> property.
252    *
253    * @param name The parameter name.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
254    * @param parameter The parameter definition.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
255    * @return This object.
256    */
257   public Swagger addParameter(String name, ParameterInfo parameter) {
258      assertArgNotNull(ARG_name, name);
259      assertArgNotNull(ARG_parameter, parameter);
260      parameters.put(name, parameter);
261      return this;
262   }
263
264   /**
265    * Bean property appender:  <property>paths</property>.
266    *
267    * <p>
268    * Adds a single value to the <property>paths</property> property.
269    *
270    * @param path The path template.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
271    * @param methodName The HTTP method name.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
272    * @param operation The operation that describes the path.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
273    * @return This object.
274    */
275   public Swagger addPath(String path, String methodName, Operation operation) {
276      assertArgNotNull(ARG_path, path);
277      assertArgNotNull(ARG_methodName, methodName);
278      assertArgNotNull(ARG_operation, operation);
279      paths.computeIfAbsent(path, k -> new OperationMap()).put(methodName, operation);
280      return this;
281   }
282
283   /**
284    * Bean property appender:  <property>produces</property>.
285    *
286    * <p>
287    * A list of MIME types the APIs can produce.
288    *
289    * @param values
290    *    The values to add to this property.
291    *    <br>Value MUST be as described under <a class="doclink" href="https://swagger.io/specification#mimeTypes">Swagger Mime Types</a>.
292    *    <br>Ignored if <jk>null</jk>.
293    * @return This object.
294    */
295   public Swagger addProduces(Collection<MediaType> values) {
296      if (nn(values))
297         produces.addAll(values);
298      return this;
299   }
300
301   /**
302    * Adds one or more values to the <property>produces</property> property.
303    *
304    * <p>
305    * A list of MIME types the APIs can produce.
306    *
307    * @param values
308    *    The values to add to this property.
309    *    <br>Value MUST be as described under <a class="doclink" href="https://swagger.io/specification#mimeTypes">Swagger Mime Types</a>.
310    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
311    * @return This object.
312    */
313   public Swagger addProduces(MediaType...values) {
314      if (nn(values))
315         for (var v : values)
316            if (nn(v))
317               produces.add(v);
318      return this;
319   }
320
321   /**
322    * Bean property appender:  <property>responses</property>.
323    *
324    * <p>
325    * Adds a single value to the <property>responses</property> property.
326    *
327    * @param name The response name.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
328    * @param response The response definition.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
329    * @return This object.
330    */
331   public Swagger addResponse(String name, ResponseInfo response) {
332      assertArgNotNull(ARG_name, name);
333      assertArgNotNull(ARG_response, response);
334      responses.put(name, response);
335      return this;
336   }
337
338   /**
339    * Bean property appender:  <property>schemes</property>.
340    *
341    * <p>
342    * The transfer protocol of the API.
343    *
344    * @param values
345    *    The values to add to this property.
346    *    <br>Valid values:
347    *    <ul>
348    *       <li><js>"http"</js>
349    *       <li><js>"https"</js>
350    *       <li><js>"ws"</js>
351    *       <li><js>"wss"</js>
352    *    </ul>
353    *    <br>Ignored if <jk>null</jk>.
354    * @return This object.
355    */
356   public Swagger addSchemes(Collection<String> values) {
357      if (nn(values))
358         schemes.addAll(values);
359      return this;
360   }
361
362   /**
363    * Bean property appender:  <property>schemes</property>.
364    *
365    * <p>
366    * The transfer protocol of the API.
367    *
368    * @param values
369    *    The values to add to this property.
370    *    <br>Valid values:
371    *    <ul>
372    *       <li><js>"http"</js>
373    *       <li><js>"https"</js>
374    *       <li><js>"ws"</js>
375    *       <li><js>"wss"</js>
376    *    </ul>
377    *    <br>Ignored if <jk>null</jk>.
378    * @return This object.
379    */
380   public Swagger addSchemes(String...values) {
381      if (nn(values))
382         for (var v : values)
383            if (nn(v))
384               schemes.add(v);
385      return this;
386   }
387
388   /**
389    * Bean property fluent setter:  <property>security</property>.
390    *
391    * <p>
392    * A declaration of which security schemes are applied for the API as a whole.
393    *
394    * @param values
395    *    The values to add to this property.
396    *    <br>Ignored if <jk>null</jk>.
397    * @return This object.
398    */
399   public Swagger addSecurity(Collection<Map<String,List<String>>> values) {
400      if (nn(values))
401         security.addAll(values);
402      return this;
403   }
404
405   /**
406    * Bean property appender:  <property>security</property>.
407    *
408    * <p>
409    * Adds a single value to the <property>securityDefinitions</property> property.
410    *
411    * @param scheme The security scheme that applies to this operation  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
412    * @param alternatives
413    *    The list of values describes alternative security schemes that can be used (that is, there is a logical OR between the security requirements).
414    * @return This object.
415    */
416   public Swagger addSecurity(String scheme, String...alternatives) {
417      assertArgNotNull(ARG_scheme, scheme);
418      Map<String,List<String>> m = map();
419      m.put(scheme, l(alternatives));
420      security.add(m);
421      return this;
422   }
423
424   /**
425    * Bean property appender:  <property>securityDefinitions</property>.
426    *
427    * <p>
428    * Adds a single value to the <property>securityDefinitions</property> property.
429    *
430    * @param name A security name.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
431    * @param securityScheme A security schema.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
432    * @return This object.
433    */
434   public Swagger addSecurityDefinition(String name, SecurityScheme securityScheme) {
435      assertArgNotNull(ARG_name, name);
436      assertArgNotNull(ARG_securityScheme, securityScheme);
437      securityDefinitions.put(name, securityScheme);
438      return this;
439   }
440
441   /**
442    * Bean property appender:  <property>tags</property>.
443    *
444    * <p>
445    * A list of tags used by the specification with additional metadata.
446    *
447    * @param values
448    *    The values to add to this property.
449    *    <br>The order of the tags can be used to reflect on their order by the parsing tools.
450    *    <br>Not all tags that are used by the <a class="doclink" href="https://swagger.io/specification/v2#operationObject">Operation Object</a> must be declared.
451    *    <br>The tags that are not declared may be organized randomly or based on the tools' logic.
452    *    <br>Each tag name in the list MUST be unique.
453    *    <br>Ignored if <jk>null</jk>.
454    * @return This object.
455    */
456   public Swagger addTags(Collection<Tag> values) {
457      if (nn(values))
458         tags.addAll(values);
459      return this;
460   }
461
462   /**
463    * Bean property appender:  <property>tags</property>.
464    *
465    * <p>
466    * A list of tags used by the specification with additional metadata.
467    *
468    * @param values
469    *    The values to add to this property.
470    *    <br>The order of the tags can be used to reflect on their order by the parsing tools.
471    *    <br>Not all tags that are used by the <a class="doclink" href="https://swagger.io/specification/v2#operationObject">Operation Object</a> must be declared.
472    *    <br>The tags that are not declared may be organized randomly or based on the tools' logic.
473    *    <br>Each tag name in the list MUST be unique.
474    *    <br>Ignored if <jk>null</jk>.
475    * @return This object.
476    */
477   public Swagger addTags(Tag...values) {
478      if (nn(values))
479         for (var v : values)
480            if (nn(v))
481               tags.add(v);
482      return this;
483   }
484
485   /**
486    * A synonym of {@link #toString()}.
487    * @return This object serialized as JSON.
488    */
489   public String asJson() {
490      return toString();
491   }
492
493   /**
494    * Make a deep copy of this object.
495    *
496    * @return A deep copy of this object.
497    */
498   public Swagger copy() {
499      return new Swagger(this);
500   }
501
502   /**
503    * Resolves a <js>"$ref"</js> tags to nodes in this swagger document.
504    *
505    * @param <T> The class to convert the reference to.
506    * @param ref The ref tag value.  Must not be <jk>null</jk> or blank.
507    * @param c The class to convert the reference to.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
508    * @return The referenced node, or <jk>null</jk> if not found.
509    */
510   public <T> T findRef(String ref, Class<T> c) {
511      assertArgNotNullOrBlank(ARG_ref, ref);
512      assertArgNotNull(ARG_c, c);
513      if (! ref.startsWith("#/"))
514         throw rex("Unsupported reference:  ''{0}''", ref);
515      try {
516         return new PathTraversal(this).get(ref.substring(1), c);
517      } catch (Exception e) {
518         throw brex(e, c, "Reference ''{0}'' could not be converted to type ''{1}''.", ref, cn(c));
519      }
520   }
521
522   @Override /* Overridden from SwaggerElement */
523   public <T> T get(String property, Class<T> type) {
524      assertArgNotNull(ARG_property, property);
525      return switch (property) {
526         case PROP_basePath -> toType(getBasePath(), type);
527         case PROP_consumes -> toType(getConsumes(), type);
528         case PROP_definitions -> toType(getDefinitions(), type);
529         case PROP_externalDocs -> toType(getExternalDocs(), type);
530         case PROP_host -> toType(getHost(), type);
531         case PROP_info -> toType(getInfo(), type);
532         case PROP_parameters -> toType(getParameters(), type);
533         case PROP_paths -> toType(getPaths(), type);
534         case PROP_produces -> toType(getProduces(), type);
535         case PROP_responses -> toType(getResponses(), type);
536         case PROP_schemes -> toType(getSchemes(), type);
537         case PROP_security -> toType(getSecurity(), type);
538         case PROP_securityDefinitions -> toType(getSecurityDefinitions(), type);
539         case PROP_swagger -> toType(getSwagger(), type);
540         case PROP_tags -> toType(getTags(), type);
541         default -> super.get(property, type);
542      };
543   }
544
545   /**
546    * Bean property getter:  <property>basePath</property>.
547    *
548    * <p>
549    * The base path on which the API is served, which is relative to the <c>host</c>.
550    *
551    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
552    */
553   public String getBasePath() { return basePath; }
554
555   /**
556    * Bean property getter:  <property>consumes</property>.
557    *
558    * <p>
559    * A list of MIME types the APIs can consume.
560    *
561    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
562    */
563   public Set<MediaType> getConsumes() { return nie(consumes); }
564
565   /**
566    * Bean property getter:  <property>definitions</property>.
567    *
568    * <p>
569    * An object to hold data types produced and consumed by operations.
570    *
571    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
572    */
573   public Map<String,JsonMap> getDefinitions() { return nie(definitions); }
574
575   /**
576    * Bean property getter:  <property>externalDocs</property>.
577    *
578    * <p>
579    * Additional external documentation.
580    *
581    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
582    */
583   public ExternalDocumentation getExternalDocs() { return externalDocs; }
584
585   /**
586    * Bean property getter:  <property>host</property>.
587    *
588    * <p>
589    * The host (name or IP) serving the API.
590    *
591    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
592    */
593   public String getHost() { return host; }
594
595   /**
596    * Bean property getter:  <property>info</property>.
597    *
598    * <p>
599    * Provides metadata about the API.
600    *
601    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
602    */
603   public Info getInfo() { return info; }
604
605   /**
606    * Shortcut for calling <c>getPaths().get(path).get(operation);</c>
607    *
608    * @param path The path (e.g. <js>"/foo"</js>).  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
609    * @param operation The HTTP operation (e.g. <js>"get"</js>).  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
610    * @return The operation for the specified path and operation id, or <jk>null</jk> if it doesn't exist.
611    */
612   public Operation getOperation(String path, String operation) {
613      assertArgNotNull(ARG_path, path);
614      assertArgNotNull(ARG_operation, operation);
615      return o(getPath(path)).map(x -> x.get(operation)).orElse(null);
616   }
617
618   /**
619    * Convenience method for calling <c>getPath(path).get(method).getParameter(in,name);</c>
620    *
621    * @param path The HTTP path.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
622    * @param method The HTTP method.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
623    * @param in The parameter type.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
624    * @param name The parameter name.  Can be <jk>null</jk> for parameter type <c>body</c>.
625    * @return The parameter information or <jk>null</jk> if not found.
626    */
627   public ParameterInfo getParameterInfo(String path, String method, String in, String name) {
628      assertArgNotNull(ARG_path, path);
629      assertArgNotNull(ARG_method, method);
630      assertArgNotNull(ARG_in, in);
631      return o(getPath(path)).map(x -> x.get(method)).map(x -> x.getParameter(in, name)).orElse(null);
632   }
633
634   /**
635    * Bean property getter:  <property>parameters</property>.
636    *
637    * <p>
638    * An object to hold parameters that can be used across operations.
639    *
640    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
641    */
642   public Map<String,ParameterInfo> getParameters() { return nie(parameters); }
643
644   /**
645    * Shortcut for calling <c>getPaths().get(path);</c>
646    *
647    * @param path The path (e.g. <js>"/foo"</js>).  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
648    * @return The operation map for the specified path, or <jk>null</jk> if it doesn't exist.
649    */
650   public OperationMap getPath(String path) {
651      assertArgNotNull(ARG_path, path);
652      return o(getPaths()).map(x -> x.get(path)).orElse(null);
653   }
654
655   /**
656    * Bean property getter:  <property>paths</property>.
657    *
658    * <p>
659    * The available paths and operations for the API.
660    *
661    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
662    */
663   public Map<String,OperationMap> getPaths() { return nie(paths); }
664
665   /**
666    * Bean property getter:  <property>produces</property>.
667    *
668    * <p>
669    * A list of MIME types the APIs can produce.
670    *
671    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
672    */
673   public Set<MediaType> getProduces() { return nie(produces); }
674
675   /**
676    * Shortcut for calling <c>getPaths().get(path).get(operation).getResponse(status);</c>
677    *
678    * @param path The path (e.g. <js>"/foo"</js>).
679    * @param operation The HTTP operation (e.g. <js>"get"</js>).
680    * @param status The HTTP response status (e.g. <js>"200"</js>).
681    * @return The operation for the specified path and operation id, or <jk>null</jk> if it doesn't exist.
682    */
683   public ResponseInfo getResponseInfo(String path, String operation, int status) {
684      return getResponseInfo(path, operation, String.valueOf(status));
685   }
686
687   /**
688    * Shortcut for calling <c>getPaths().get(path).get(operation).getResponse(status);</c>
689    *
690    * @param path The path (e.g. <js>"/foo"</js>).  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
691    * @param operation The HTTP operation (e.g. <js>"get"</js>).  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
692    * @param status The HTTP response status (e.g. <js>"200"</js>).  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
693    * @return The operation for the specified path and operation id, or <jk>null</jk> if it doesn't exist.
694    */
695   public ResponseInfo getResponseInfo(String path, String operation, String status) {
696      assertArgNotNull(ARG_path, path);
697      assertArgNotNull(ARG_operation, operation);
698      assertArgNotNull(ARG_status, status);
699      return o(getPath(path)).map(x -> x.get(operation)).map(x -> x.getResponse(status)).orElse(null);
700   }
701
702   /**
703    * Bean property getter:  <property>responses</property>.
704    *
705    * <p>
706    * An object to hold responses that can be used across operations.
707    *
708    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
709    */
710   public Map<String,ResponseInfo> getResponses() { return nie(responses); }
711
712   /**
713    * Bean property getter:  <property>schemes</property>.
714    *
715    * <p>
716    * The transfer protocol of the API.
717    *
718    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
719    */
720   public Set<String> getSchemes() { return nie(schemes); }
721
722   /**
723    * Bean property getter:  <property>security</property>.
724    *
725    * <p>
726    * A declaration of which security schemes are applied for the API as a whole.
727    *
728    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
729    */
730   public List<Map<String,List<String>>> getSecurity() { return nie(security); }
731
732   /**
733    * Bean property getter:  <property>securityDefinitions</property>.
734    *
735    * <p>
736    * Security scheme definitions that can be used across the specification.
737    *
738    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
739    */
740   public Map<String,SecurityScheme> getSecurityDefinitions() { return nie(securityDefinitions); }
741
742   /**
743    * Bean property getter:  <property>swagger</property>.
744    *
745    * <p>
746    * Specifies the Swagger Specification version being used.
747    *
748    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
749    */
750   public String getSwagger() { return swagger; }
751
752   /**
753    * Bean property getter:  <property>tags</property>.
754    *
755    * <p>
756    * A list of tags used by the specification with additional metadata.
757    *
758    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
759    */
760   public Set<Tag> getTags() { return nie(tags); }
761
762   @Override /* Overridden from SwaggerElement */
763   public Set<String> keySet() {
764      // @formatter:off
765      var s = stb(String.class)
766         .addIf(nn(basePath), PROP_basePath)
767         .addIf(ine(consumes), PROP_consumes)
768         .addIf(ine(definitions), PROP_definitions)
769         .addIf(nn(externalDocs), PROP_externalDocs)
770         .addIf(nn(host), PROP_host)
771         .addIf(nn(info), PROP_info)
772         .addIf(ine(parameters), PROP_parameters)
773         .addIf(ine(paths), PROP_paths)
774         .addIf(ine(produces), PROP_produces)
775         .addIf(ine(responses), PROP_responses)
776         .addIf(ine(schemes), PROP_schemes)
777         .addIf(ine(security), PROP_security)
778         .addIf(ine(securityDefinitions), PROP_securityDefinitions)
779         .addIf(nn(swagger), PROP_swagger)
780         .addIf(ine(tags), PROP_tags)
781         .build();
782      // @formatter:on
783      return new MultiSet<>(s, super.keySet());
784   }
785
786   @SuppressWarnings({
787      "rawtypes", // Raw types necessary for generic type handling
788      "unchecked" // Type erasure requires unchecked casts in generic type conversions
789   })
790   @Override /* Overridden from SwaggerElement */
791   public Swagger set(String property, Object value) {
792      assertArgNotNull(ARG_property, property);
793      return switch (property) {
794         case PROP_basePath -> setBasePath(s(value));
795         case PROP_consumes -> setConsumes(toListBuilder(value, MediaType.class).sparse().build());
796         case PROP_definitions -> setDefinitions(toMapBuilder(value, String.class, JsonMap.class).sparse().build());
797         case PROP_externalDocs -> setExternalDocs(toType(value, ExternalDocumentation.class));
798         case PROP_host -> setHost(s(value));
799         case PROP_info -> setInfo(toType(value, Info.class));
800         case PROP_parameters -> setParameters(toMapBuilder(value, String.class, ParameterInfo.class).sparse().build());
801         case PROP_paths -> setPaths(toMapBuilder(value, String.class, OperationMap.class).sparse().build());
802         case PROP_produces -> setProduces(toListBuilder(value, MediaType.class).sparse().build());
803         case PROP_responses -> setResponses(toMapBuilder(value, String.class, ResponseInfo.class).sparse().build());
804         case PROP_schemes -> setSchemes(toListBuilder(value, String.class).sparse().build());
805         case PROP_security -> setSecurity((List)toListBuilder(value, MapOfStringLists.class).sparse().build());
806         case PROP_securityDefinitions -> setSecurityDefinitions(toMapBuilder(value, String.class, SecurityScheme.class).sparse().build());
807         case PROP_swagger -> setSwagger(s(value));
808         case PROP_tags -> setTags(toListBuilder(value, Tag.class).sparse().build());
809         default -> {
810            super.set(property, value);
811            yield this;
812         }
813      };
814   }
815
816   /**
817    * Bean property setter:  <property>basePath</property>.
818    *
819    * <p>
820    * The base path on which the API is served, which is relative to the <c>host</c>.
821    *
822    * @param value
823    *    The new value for this property.
824    *    <br>If it is not included, the API is served directly under the <c>host</c>.
825    *    <br>The value MUST start with a leading slash (/).
826    *    <br>The <c>basePath</c> does not support <a class="doclink" href="https://swagger.io/specification/v2#pathTemplating">path templating</a>.
827    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
828    * @return This object.
829    */
830   public Swagger setBasePath(String value) {
831      basePath = value;
832      return this;
833   }
834
835   /**
836    * Bean property setter:  <property>consumes</property>.
837    *
838    * <p>
839    * A list of MIME types the APIs can consume.
840    *
841    * @param value
842    *    The new value for this property.
843    *    <br>Value MUST be as described under <a class="doclink" href="https://swagger.io/specification#mimeTypes">Swagger Mime Types</a>.
844    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
845    * @return This object.
846    */
847   public Swagger setConsumes(Collection<MediaType> value) {
848      consumes.clear();
849      if (nn(value))
850         consumes.addAll(value);
851      return this;
852   }
853
854   /**
855    * Bean property fluent setter:  <property>consumes</property>.
856    *
857    * <p>
858    * A list of MIME types the APIs can consume.
859    *
860    * @param value
861    *    The values to set on this property.
862    * @return This object.
863    */
864   public Swagger setConsumes(MediaType...value) {
865      setConsumes(stb(MediaType.class).sparse().add(value).build());
866      return this;
867   }
868
869   /**
870    * Bean property setter:  <property>definitions</property>.
871    *
872    * <p>
873    * An object to hold data types produced and consumed by operations.
874    *
875    * @param value
876    *    The new value for this property.
877    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
878    * @return This object.
879    */
880   public Swagger setDefinitions(Map<String,JsonMap> value) {
881      definitions.clear();
882      if (nn(value))
883         definitions.putAll(value);
884      return this;
885   }
886
887   /**
888    * Bean property setter:  <property>externalDocs</property>.
889    *
890    * <p>
891    * Additional external documentation.
892    *
893    * @param value
894    *    The new value for this property.
895    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
896    * @return This object.
897    */
898   public Swagger setExternalDocs(ExternalDocumentation value) {
899      externalDocs = value;
900      return this;
901   }
902
903   /**
904    * Bean property setter:  <property>host</property>.
905    *
906    * <p>
907    * The host (name or IP) serving the API.
908    *
909    * @param value
910    *    The new value for this property.
911    *    <br>This MUST be the host only and does not include the scheme nor sub-paths.
912    *    <br>It MAY include a port.
913    *    <br>If the host is not included, the host serving the documentation is to be used (including the port).
914    *    <br>The host does not support <a class="doclink" href="https://swagger.io/specification/v2#pathTemplating">path templating</a>
915    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
916    * @return This object.
917    */
918   public Swagger setHost(String value) {
919      host = value;
920      return this;
921   }
922
923   /**
924    * Bean property setter:  <property>info</property>.
925    *
926    * <p>
927    * Provides metadata about the API.
928    *
929    * @param value
930    *    The new value for this property.
931    *    <br>Property value is required.
932    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
933    * @return This object.
934    */
935   public Swagger setInfo(Info value) {
936      info = value;
937      return this;
938   }
939
940   /**
941    * Bean property setter:  <property>parameters</property>.
942    *
943    * <p>
944    * An object to hold parameters that can be used across operations.
945    *
946    * @param value
947    *    The new value for this property.
948    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
949    * @return This object.
950    */
951   public Swagger setParameters(Map<String,ParameterInfo> value) {
952      parameters.clear();
953      if (nn(value))
954         parameters.putAll(value);
955      return this;
956   }
957
958   /**
959    * Bean property setter:  <property>paths</property>.
960    *
961    * <p>
962    * The available paths and operations for the API.
963    *
964    * @param value
965    *    The new value for this property.
966    *    <br>Property value is required.
967    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
968    * @return This object.
969    */
970   public Swagger setPaths(Map<String,OperationMap> value) {
971      paths.clear();
972      if (nn(value))
973         paths.putAll(value);
974      return this;
975   }
976
977   /**
978    * Bean property setter:  <property>produces</property>.
979    *
980    * <p>
981    * A list of MIME types the APIs can produce.
982    *
983    * @param value
984    *    The new value for this property.
985    *    <br>Value MUST be as described under <a class="doclink" href="https://swagger.io/specification#mimeTypes">Swagger Mime Types</a>.
986    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
987    * @return This object.
988    */
989   public Swagger setProduces(Collection<MediaType> value) {
990      produces.clear();
991      if (nn(value))
992         produces.addAll(value);
993      return this;
994   }
995
996   /**
997    * Bean property fluent setter:  <property>produces</property>.
998    *
999    * <p>
1000    * A list of MIME types the APIs can produce.
1001    *
1002    * @param value
1003    *    The new value for this property.
1004    * @return This object.
1005    */
1006   public Swagger setProduces(MediaType...value) {
1007      setProduces(stb(MediaType.class).sparse().add(value).build());
1008      return this;
1009   }
1010
1011   /**
1012    * Bean property setter:  <property>responses</property>.
1013    *
1014    * <p>
1015    * An object to hold responses that can be used across operations.
1016    *
1017    * @param value
1018    *    The new value for this property.
1019    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1020    * @return This object.
1021    */
1022   public Swagger setResponses(Map<String,ResponseInfo> value) {
1023      responses.clear();
1024      if (nn(value))
1025         responses.putAll(value);
1026      return this;
1027   }
1028
1029   /**
1030    * Bean property setter:  <property>schemes</property>.
1031    *
1032    * <p>
1033    * The transfer protocol of the API.
1034    *
1035    * @param value
1036    *    The new value for this property.
1037    *    <br>Valid values:
1038    *    <ul>
1039    *       <li><js>"http"</js>
1040    *       <li><js>"https"</js>
1041    *       <li><js>"ws"</js>
1042    *       <li><js>"wss"</js>
1043    *    </ul>
1044    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1045    * @return This object.
1046    */
1047   public Swagger setSchemes(Collection<String> value) {
1048      schemes.clear();
1049      if (nn(value))
1050         schemes.addAll(value);
1051      return this;
1052   }
1053
1054   /**
1055    * Bean property fluent setter:  <property>schemes</property>.
1056    *
1057    * <p>
1058    * The transfer protocol of the API.
1059    *
1060    * @param value
1061    *    The new value for this property.
1062    *    <br>Strings can be JSON arrays.
1063    * @return This object.
1064    */
1065   public Swagger setSchemes(String...value) {
1066      setSchemes(stb(String.class).sparse().addJson(value).build());
1067      return this;
1068   }
1069
1070   /**
1071    * Bean property setter:  <property>security</property>.
1072    *
1073    * <p>
1074    * A declaration of which security schemes are applied for the API as a whole.
1075    *
1076    * @param value
1077    *    The new value for this property.
1078    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1079    * @return This object.
1080    */
1081   public Swagger setSecurity(Collection<Map<String,List<String>>> value) {
1082      security.clear();
1083      if (nn(value))
1084         security.addAll(value);
1085      return this;
1086   }
1087
1088   /**
1089    * Bean property setter:  <property>securityDefinitions</property>.
1090    *
1091    * <p>
1092    * Security scheme definitions that can be used across the specification.
1093    *
1094    * @param value
1095    *    The new value for this property.
1096    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1097    * @return This object.
1098    */
1099   public Swagger setSecurityDefinitions(Map<String,SecurityScheme> value) {
1100      securityDefinitions.clear();
1101      if (nn(value))
1102         securityDefinitions.putAll(value);
1103      return this;
1104   }
1105
1106   /**
1107    * Bean property setter:  <property>swagger</property>.
1108    *
1109    * <p>
1110    * Specifies the Swagger Specification version being used.
1111    *
1112    * @param value
1113    *    The new value for this property.
1114    *    <br>Property value is required.
1115    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1116    * @return This object.
1117    */
1118   public Swagger setSwagger(String value) {
1119      swagger = value;
1120      return this;
1121   }
1122
1123   /**
1124    * Bean property setter:  <property>tags</property>.
1125    *
1126    * <p>
1127    * A list of tags used by the specification with additional metadata.
1128    *
1129    * @param value
1130    *    The new value for this property.
1131    *    <br>The order of the tags can be used to reflect on their order by the parsing tools.
1132    *    <br>Not all tags that are used by the <a class="doclink" href="https://swagger.io/specification/v2#operationObject">Operation Object</a> must be declared.
1133    *    <br>The tags that are not declared may be organized randomly or based on the tools' logic.
1134    *    <br>Each tag name in the list MUST be unique.
1135    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1136    * @return This object.
1137    */
1138   public Swagger setTags(Collection<Tag> value) {
1139      tags.clear();
1140      if (nn(value))
1141         tags.addAll(value);
1142      return this;
1143   }
1144
1145   /**
1146    * Bean property setter:  <property>tags</property>.
1147    *
1148    * <p>
1149    * A list of tags used by the specification with additional metadata.
1150    *
1151    * @param value
1152    *    The new value for this property.
1153    *    <br>The order of the tags can be used to reflect on their order by the parsing tools.
1154    *    <br>Not all tags that are used by the <a class="doclink" href="https://swagger.io/specification/v2#operationObject">Operation Object</a> must be declared.
1155    *    <br>The tags that are not declared may be organized randomly or based on the tools' logic.
1156    *    <br>Each tag name in the list MUST be unique.
1157    *    <br>Ignored if <jk>null</jk>.
1158    * @return This object.
1159    */
1160   public Swagger setTags(Tag...value) {
1161      setTags(stb(Tag.class).sparse().add(value).build());
1162      return this;
1163   }
1164
1165   /**
1166    * Sets strict mode on this bean.
1167    *
1168    * @return This object.
1169    */
1170   @Override
1171   public Swagger strict() {
1172      super.strict();
1173      return this;
1174   }
1175
1176   /**
1177    * Sets strict mode on this bean.
1178    *
1179    * @param value
1180    *    The new value for this property.
1181    *    <br>Non-boolean values will be converted to boolean using <code>Boolean.<jsm>valueOf</jsm>(value.toString())</code>.
1182    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> (interpreted as <jk>false</jk>).
1183    * @return This object.
1184    */
1185   @Override
1186   public Swagger strict(Object value) {
1187      super.strict(value);
1188      return this;
1189   }
1190
1191   @Override /* Overridden from Object */
1192   public String toString() {
1193      return JsonSerializer.DEFAULT.toString(this);
1194   }
1195}
